title: Basecamp
description: A simple basecamp of great vanilla-friendly client-side mods, from performance improvements to simple but welcome visual and audio improvements.
body:
# Basecamp

A simple basecamp of great vanilla-friendly client-side mods, from performance improvements to simple but welcome visual and audio improvements.

Focused on the little details, from particle effects to pure performance, this pack is perfect for improving your Minecraft experience.

### Make sure to check out [Fabulously Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized), as this pack takes much influence from them!
